title: PixelCraft Studio
description: Design system and component library powering a multi-brand e-commerce platform.
overview: PixelCraft is a token-driven design system built to unify three e-commerce brands under one technical foundation. It includes 40+ accessible components, dark mode support, and automated visual regression testing.
challenge: Three brands with distinct visual identities needed to share infrastructure without looking identical. Designers wanted Figma-to-code parity, while engineers demanded tree-shakeable imports and strict TypeScript props.
solution: I created a multi-theme token architecture using CSS custom properties, with brand overrides layered on a shared primitive set. Storybook documents every component with interaction tests. A custom CLI scaffolds new components with tests and docs pre-wired.
results: Cut new feature UI development time by 40%. Zero accessibility regressions in 6 months of Chromatic snapshots. Design-dev handoff time dropped from 2 days to same-day.
